schema_version.description: Version of the DITTO schema set this document conforms to

work_item_id.description: Stable identifier for a work item

schema_version.description: Version of the DITTO schema set this document conforms to

work_item_id.description: Stable identifier for a work item

root_id.description: Id of the root node (user original intent)

parent_id.description: Parent node id; null for the root

origin.description: How a coverage node entered the tree (§3.2)

state.description: Closure state of a coverage node (§3.3)

children.description: Child node ids (flat array + parent_id represents the tree/DAG)

close_reason.description: Recorded justification when the node is closed in a non-resolved state — a skip/deferral must be justified, never silent (§8-2, ac-2)

residual_risk.description: The surviving risk a non-resolved close leaves behind (out_of_scope/user_owned) — distinct from close_reason (WHY skipped); this names WHAT RISK survives the skip. Required for a non-resolved close, recorded on the node (surviving-risk self-description gap)

disposition.description: Disposition route of a category node; absent = DEFAULT_COVERAGE_DISPOSITION

items.description: One node in the coverage scope tree (§3.1)

intensity.description: Entry intensity override (ac-4) persisted on the first seed so the tier and termination depth K stay consistent across every round without the caller re-passing it (§8-4)

tree.description: Coverage map sidecar (coverage.json) — additive dynamic-growth scope tree (§9)

severity.description: Prism node severity — critical nodes gate minimal-launch (MODEL-2)

demotion_reason.description: Explicit justification recorded on a critical→noncritical demotion (MODEL-2)

justifying_reason.description: The actual reason justifying a critical resolved-close (A2 close-gate input, ac-1)

refutation_attempted.description: Whether a strongest-rebuttal (Popper refutation) was attempted before closing — the field-presence gate closePrismNode reads (A2, ac-1)

opponent_critique.description: Dialectic-opponent critique + Popper refutation recorded on a flagged critical node (ac-5)

opponent_dissent.description: Codex independent 2nd-perspective dissent re-derived from original intent at anchor re-facing (ac-6)

opponent_status.description: Self-describing opponent-seam status; host_absent when the host degrades (OBJ-3 / ADR-0018)

items.description: One prism-level per-node evaluation annotation — argumentation state + opponent seam (ac-1/ac-5/ac-6)

evaluations.description: Per-node prism-level argumentation + opponent-seam evaluation state (ac-1/ac-5/ac-6)

notified_at.description: When minimal-launch was announced (one-shot; retracted on regression, ac-4)

prism-issue-map.description: Prism issue map — coverage tree + severity authority + launch notification (oi1)
